summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Web Analytics dashboard integration. Backend endpoints unavailable (404 errors), but frontend functioning perfectly with mock data fallback as designed.

critical_bugs.impact: Dashboard KPIs fallback to mock data
Real-time visitor data uses mock fallback
Falls back to polling mode (30s intervals)

passed_tests: Web Analytics menu item appears in ANALYTICS sidebar section
All 4 KPI cards display correctly (Total Visitors: 12,847, Conversions: 423, Bounce Rate: 42.7%, Avg Session Duration: 4m 5s)
Date range selector (7/14/30/90 days) visible and functional in header
Real-time visitors panel shows live chart with active visitor count (30-52 active now)
Active Sessions panel displays with traffic source breakdown (Direct: 46%, Organic: 37%, Referral: 9%, Social: 5%, Paid: 12%)
Top Pages list displays correctly in Active Sessions panel
Click Heatmap section displays with page selector dropdown (Features Page, Pricing Page, etc.)
Heatmap days selector dropdown (7/14/30 days) functional
Refresh button works and updates dashboard data
Connection status shows 'Polling' indicator (correct fallback when WebSocket unavailable)
Date range selector changes data display (7 days → 14 days → 30 days)
Page selector changes heatmap visualization (Pricing Page → Features Page)
Mock data fallback working correctly for all components
Heatmap visualization displays click distribution and page metrics
Traffic source colors and percentages display correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Backend Web Analytics API endpoints need implementation: 1) /api/dashboard/overview?days=X 2) /api/dashboard/realtime 3) /api/dashboard/heatmap-data?page_url=X&days=X 4) WebSocket endpoint wss://*/api/ws/analytics?token=X. All endpoints return 404 Not Found errors.
